editorialNotes: Reviewed after PR #600 merged into dev.

commitSubjects: perf: cull dense map markers during motion

fixes: Dense Map movement now keeps only the active marker budget attached while pan or zoom is in progress, then restores the full capped marker set after motion settles.
The fallback Map renderer now uses the same active-marker cull, which protects the headless performance guard and lower-power render paths from carrying all dense marker nodes during motion.
The 1,600-author Map performance check now verifies attached marker count during movement, not just visible marker count.
followUps: Continue monitoring installed-build WebKit RSS and windowless app state during scraper-heavy soaks.

releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.5.1300-dev

Lighter location rendering.

### Fixes

- Dense Map movement now keeps only the active marker budget attached while pan or zoom is in progress, then restores the full capped marker set after motion settles.
- The fallback Map renderer now uses the same active-marker cull, which protects the headless performance guard and lower-power render paths from carrying all dense marker nodes during motion.
- The 1,600-author Map performance check now verifies attached marker count during movement, not just visible marker count.

### Follow-ups

- Continue monitoring installed-build WebKit RSS and windowless app state during scraper-heavy soaks.

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
